query: SELECT id, leadPhone, leadName, stage, leadSource, reactivationLastPrice, reactivationDiscountPct, aiMode, messageHistory, createdAt, updatedAt FROM conversation_sessions WHERE leadPhone = '+13029816191' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
